---
title: 'Word of God from Oliver Simon. 11/29/2013 12:00 pm'
date: '2013-11-29T20:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8172743163213964402'
blogger_filename: '/2013/11/word-of-god-from-oliver-simon-11292013.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word From God'
  - 'Vision'
---

Word of God from Oliver Simon. 11/29/2013 12:00 pm<br />
<br />
You stay strong, love our Lord and cause some damage in the kingdom of darkness. Your generation is waiting on you to deliver them because surely a message has been entrusted to you for them.
